name: Frank Zhang
description:
𑣲⋆。 ̊ wandering (request)

in which, you don’t know you’re a demigod. after a bitter argument with your parent, you leave home without a plan, letting the road, and eventually the forest, pull you farther away.

𑣲⋆。 ̊ by the time you realize you’re lost, you’ve already wandered somewhere you shouldn’t be... right into the borders of a hidden camp, where a very confused boy is on guard duty.
